name: automatiq-sdet-exercise
description: Basic k6 API testing framework in TypeScript for Google Geocode API.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:geocode:report: mkdir -p reports && REPORT_DIR=reports k6 run tests/sdet_geocode_api_test.ts
scripts.test:geocode:negative:report: mkdir -p reports && REPORT_DIR=reports k6 run tests/sdet_geocode_negative_api_test.ts
